content.description:
ES module wrapper for Acorn JavaScript parser.

## Usage

```javascript
await api.require('acorn');  // Load first to set window.acorn
const acorn = await api.require('acorn-wrapper');

const ast = acorn.parse(code, {
  ecmaVersion: 'latest',
  sourceType: 'module',
  locations: true
});
```

## Exports

- `default` - The full acorn object
- `parse` - `acorn.parse()` function
- `tokenizer` - `acorn.tokenizer()` function
- `Parser` - `acorn.Parser` class for extending

## See Also

- [acorn](item://ac0ac0ac-0001-0000-0000-000000000000) — Raw Acorn library (must be loaded first)
